description.value:
Receive Prescription processing aanvullendeinformatie building blocks for patient C. XXX_Coenen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 2 Aanvullende informatie Aanvullende informatie (MA), aanvullende wensen (VV)
Receive Prescription processing aanvullendeinformatie resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '425087') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '17205') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '41092') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '373784005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '425087') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '17205') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '41092') ))).where((quantity.value = 40)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '425087|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (BROXIL CAPSULE 500MG)
